examples: Besides the meal and pantry food lockers, a fresh food locker is packed at KSC and installed on the shuttle 18 to 24 hours before launch.
With the help of Gomez's father, they built the Blessing Box—a street pantry, with shelves and hanging baskets and two doors made from old furniture.
"We shall creep out quietly into the butler's pantry—" cried the Mole.
And an ample pantry is probably something the Romneys will pay particular attention to.
While the request yielded a pantry-full of nifty additions, one popular suggestion fell flat.
